question: key features of fastApi
answer:
The key features of FastAPI include:
- **Fast**: Very high performance, on par with NodeJS and Go [Source: fastapi_guide.md, https://fastapi.tiangolo.com/ (chunk 6)].
- **Fast to code**: Increase development speed by 200–300% [Source: fastapi_guide.md].
- **Fewer bugs**: Automatic data validation via Pydantic [Source: fastapi_guide.md].
- **Intuitive**: Great editor support with auto-completion [Source: fastapi_guide.md].
- **Easy**: Designed to be easy to use and learn [Source: fastapi_guide.md].
- **Short**: Minimises code duplication [Source: fastapi_guide.md].
- **Robust**: Get production-ready code with automatic interactive documentation [Source: fastapi_guide.md].
- **Standards-based**: Based on OpenAPI and JSON Schema [Source: fastapi_guide.md]. 

Additionally, it is also mentioned that FastAPI is "beautifully designed, simple to use and highly scalable" [Source: https://fastapi.tiangolo.com/ (chunk 10)].
